headline: Earnings Preview: AptarGroup (ATR) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: AptarGroup (ATR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
